quote: Give a man the ability to achieve, and he will crawl over broken glass with a smile.
No one ever changed the world by doing what the world told them to do.
Failure hurts once, wisdom is forever.
You're built for adventure.
How much of your potential are you okay with reaching?
The voyage of discovery is not in seeking new landscapes, but in having new eyes.
author: Marcel Proust

quote: Ask not for a lighter burden, but for broader shoulders.
You can choose to suffer the pain of discipline or the pain of regret.
Do you want to suffer the pain of discipline or the pain of regret?
No one can build you the bridge on which you, and only you, must cross the river of life.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, Untimely Meditations (1873)

quote: There is only one path in the world which no one can walk except yourself: whither does it lead? Do not ask, but walk.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quote: Tradition is not the worship of ashes, but the preservation of fire.
author: Gustav Mahler, Austrian composer

quote: The feats you conquer today will join you in the battle tomorrow.
Relentlessly resourceful.
We are the new adults.
You will never be as young as you are right now.
Wake up to your own potential.
Conventional wisdom will get you conventional results.
Follow your dreams. Stop listening to people who don't.
If you want to be an entrepreneur, you may be better off ignoring all advice from non-entrepreneurs, rather than trying to pick out the good stuff.
Bad decisions really do make good stories.
One must still have chaos in oneself to be able to give birth to a dancing star.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quote: Develop the strength to do bold things, not the strength to suffer.
And those who were seen dancing were thought to be insane by those who could not hear the music.
There is a tide in the affairs of men, which, taken at the flood, leads on to fortune.
author: William Shakespeare, Julius Caesar

quote: Every man has two lives. The second begins when he realizes he has just one.
A lion does not concern himself with the opinion of sheep.
If a bird lands on a branch, does he trust the branch or his wings?
If a bird lands on a branch, does it trust the branch or its wings?
No man ever steps in the same river twice, for it's not the same river and he's not the same man.
Not every lion who chased the zebra caught it, but every lion who caught the zebra chased it.
Would your ancestors consider you a pussy?
The insight you're looking for cannot be put into words.
We were born to inherit the stars.
Live as though all your ancestors were living again through you.
There is someone your age living their last day on Earth wishing they had the time you have.
No amount of guilt can solve the past. No amount of anxiety can change the future.
What a privilege it is to be tired from work you once begged the universe for.
There are two people in your life you need to make proud. The first is the 80-year-old you. The second is the 8-year-old you.
Act as if.
author: Boiler Room (2000)

quote: True hell is when the person you have become meets the person you could have been.
Step by step, furiously.
We do not act rightly because we have virtue or excellence, but we rather have those because we have acted rightly.
author: Aristotle, a summary of his ideas in The Nicomachean Ethics

quote: You don't have to do anything right now.
You do not see the world as it is, but as you are.
Never trust a spiritual leader who cannot dance.
author: Mr. Miyagi, The Next Karate Kid

quote: Don't be so busy making a living that you forget to make a life.
Veni, vidi, vici.
You're either playing to win or playing not to lose.
Find joy in the journey.
You can't go back and change the beginning, but you can start where you are and change the ending.
Happiness is the moment right before you need more happiness.
If there's no good reason to say no, say yes.
The greatest ship in the world is useless if the captain doesn't know where he's going.
You allow things.
If you only do what you have to do, you'll always have to do what you're told.
If you only do what you're paid for, you're getting paid exactly the right amount.
It's only embarrassing if you let it be.
Misery loves company.
Success is getting what you want. Happiness is wanting what you get.
Hate always comes from beneath. Nobody gets jealous of losers.
Where awareness goes, attention follows.
Where awareness goes, attention flows. Attention then influences our thoughts, which influence our actions, which determines our entire life.
Your meaning in life is proportionate to the amount of responsibility you take on.
Imagine what you could achieve if you lived your life as if anything was possible.
Better competent than protected.
It doesn't need to be done perfectly, it just needs to be done.
One thing you really can't get back is time.
Make more mistakes than others make attempts.
The best way to predict your future is to create it.
Everyone thinks they're the hero of their own story, even the villains.
Self-respect is the fruit of discipline.
There's only one way to guarantee you won't make it, and that's not to try at all.
Things don't get better if you don't try to make them better.
People won't dislike you because you're honest. They'll dislike you because you're an asshole.
Being bad at something is the first step to being sorta good at something.
Sucking at something is the first step towards being sorta good at something.
author: Jake the Dog, Adventure Time

quote: God put the best things in life on the other side of fear.
author: Will Smith

quote: So be afraid, then do it anyway.
Per ardua ad astra — through adversity to the stars.
author: Official motto of the Royal Air Force

quote: Denial is subconscious. Otherwise, it wouldn't work.
For someone to convince you they know a lot about something, they just need to know more about it than you.
Visualization over mental masturbation.
Wealth is no good if you don't know what to do with it.
'Someday' isn't a day of the week.
If they pay you to do it, you ain't gotta ask what you're worth to them.
Try to kick me while I'm down, I break your leg.
author: Lil Wayne, No Love

quote: When someone is evil, it's often not from them, but an echo of past evils which they experienced.
The mind is a powerful servant but a terrible master.
It's funny how day to day nothing changes, but when you look back, everything has changed.
Debunking bullshit is way harder than creating it.
Don't cling to a mistake just because you spent a lot of time making it.
O God, that I were a man! I would eat his heart in the market-place.
author: Beatrice, Much Ado About Nothing by William Shakespeare

quote: Icarus laughed as he fell. For he knew that falling meant he had soared.
Fear leads to anger, anger leads to hate, hate leads to suffering.
author: Yoda, Star Wars Episode I

quote: Fear allows you to be comfortably miserable.
Embarrassment is an underexplored emotion. Go out there and make a fool of yourself.
First we are children to our parents, then parents to our children, then parents to our parents, then children to our children.
The child is the father of the man.
To admit you were wrong is to show you are wiser today than you were yesterday.
If you act defensively when you're not being attacked, the other person will feel attacked.
If we had no faults of our own, we would not take so much pleasure in noticing the faults of others.
The most important things in life cannot be put into words or even explained.
Life ain't shit without female.
author: King Von, No Jumper podcast interview

quote: Before enlightenment, chop wood, carry water. After enlightenment, chop wood, carry water.
Chop wood, carry water.
Don't fear failure. Not failure, but low aim, is the crime. In great attempts it is glorious even to fail.
author: Bruce Lee, Striking Thoughts: Bruce Lee's Wisdom for Daily Living

quote: The interesting thing about advice is people are often extrapolating from relatively few experiences.
author: Bret Taylor, CEO of Salesforce, CTO of Facebook, Chairman of Twitter, helped create Google Maps and the Like button

quote: We love the underdog until they're not one anymore. We love the scrappy person until that person gets a jet.
A person who thinks all the time has nothing to think about except thoughts.
Rich cuz my ideas.
author: A$AP Rocky, New Choppa

quote: Is it your own destiny or is it a destiny someone else has tried to force on you? I'm begging you — look inward and begin asking yourself the big questions. Who are you? And what do you want?
author: Uncle Iroh, Avatar: The Last Airbender

quote: I never thought I'd die fighting side by side with an elf. What about side by side with a friend? Aye, I can do that.
author: Gimli to Legolas, The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King

quote: Impossible ain't impossible at all.
author: Lil Wayne, Buy the World

quote: Move fast and break things.
author: Mark Zuckerberg, early motto of Facebook

quote: How lucky am I to have something that makes saying goodbye so hard.
author: Winnie the Pooh

quote: You can be anything you want.
author: Wiz Khalifa, Medicated

quote: And, when you want something, all the universe conspires in helping you to achieve it.
author: The Alchemist by Paulo Coelho

quote: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson, Self-Reliance

quote: In the depth of winter, I finally learned that there was in me an invincible summer.
author: Albert Camus, The Stranger

quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu, Tao Te Ching

quote: The world breaks everyone, and afterward, some are strong at the broken places.
author: Ernest Hemingway, A Farewell to Arms (1929)

quote: All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien, The Fellowship of the Ring (1954)

quote: Taking a new step, uttering a new word, is what people fear most.
author: Fyodor Dostoevsky, Crime and Punishment (1866)

quote: Teenagers know something that kids don't know and adults end up forgetting.
You don't realize you're in the good old days until they're gone already.
If you must go, be wise.
Got a pocket full of money and a mind full of ideas.
author: 2 Chainz, verse on No Problem by Chance the Rapper ft. 2 Chainz & Lil Wayne (2016)

quote: Maybe your path is harder because your calling is higher.
You cannot use someone else's map to find yourself.
If I were not a physicist, I would probably be a musician. I often think in music. I live my daydreams in music. I see my life in terms of music.
author: Albert Einstein, interview with the Saturday Evening Post (October 26, 1929)

quote: Marijuana is the drug of illusion. It creates the illusion that you are thinking great thoughts and doing great things while you are sitting on the sofa growing a beard.
author: John McAfee, founder of McAfee Anti-Virus software

quote: Hoes gon' be hoes.
author: Lil Wayne, 6 Foot 7 Foot

quote: Are you scared of your potential because of the effort it requires?
There are things out there so good, you wouldn't know to ask for them.
There are things out there so good, you wouldn't know to ask for them. You have no idea how good it can get, how good it can be.
It can be very scary sometimes to accept the dream that you have, and it's scarier still to say 'okay, I want that.'
author: Kobe Bryant, TEDxShanghai talk

quote: Work hard. Be somebody. And be something more than you see in the mirror.
author: Lil Wayne, studio interview

quote: It is very important to be positive and optimistic in life. Dismiss the prophets of doom. Have self confidence. Believe in yourself.
author: Mukesh Ambani, Indian billionaire and chairman of Reliance Industries, during a public speech

quote: Will you follow dogma or will you be original?
author: Jeff Bezos, commencement speech

quote: If you could see 'em now, you'd be proud, but you'd think they's yuppies.
author: Zach Bryan, Pink Skies

quote: If you have this opportunity to play the game of life, you need to appreciate every moment. A lot of people don't appreciate their moment until it's passed.
author: Kanye West, Grammy acceptance speech for The College Dropout

quote: When people can't do something themselves, they wanna tell you 'you can't do it.' You want something, go get it. Period.
author: Pursuit of Happyness (2006)

quote: You can fail at what you don't want, so you might as well take a chance on doing what you love.
author: Jim Carrey, Maharishi University commencement speech (2014)

quote: People will root for you as long as you can't beat them in the game they value most.
I could always hear my best self clearing his throat in the room next door.
You are the universe.
I grew up in the city. I know sometimes we had less. Compared to some of my niggas down the block, man, we were blessed.
author: J. Cole, Love Yourz

quote: It's simple: when God is for you, who can be against you?
author: Ray Lewis, postgame interview after winning Super Bowl XLVII

quote: Got your whole future ahead of you, but your past is making the present wrong.
author: Skizzy Mars, Lucy (Olivver Remix)

quote: Perceiving children as psychologically fragile is a quintessentially modern concept.
author: Anna Lembke, Dopamine Nation (2021)

quote: So many times, it happens too fast. You trade your passion for glory. Don't lose your grip on the dreams of the past. You must fight just to keep them alive.
author: Survivor, Eye of the Tiger

quote: Lessons I was taught are quick to fade, soon as I realized that turning papers in won't get me paid.
author: Drake, Underground Kings

quote: When I came to America, I felt like — finally, I'm in my home.
author: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Arnold (Netflix Documentary)

quote: Nietzsche was right that what does not kill you will make you stronger.
author: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Arnold (Netflix Documentary)

quote: Pressure. It changes everything, pressure. Some people, you squeeze 'em, they focus. Others fold. Can you summon your talent at will? Can you deliver on a deadline?
author: The Devil's Advocate (1997)

quote: You can go to live in France, but you cannot become a Frenchman. You can go to live in Germany or Turkey or Japan, but you cannot become a German, a Turk, or a Japanese. But anyone, from any corner of the Earth, can come to live in America and become an American.
author: Ronald Reagan, farewell address as president (January 19, 1989)

quote: Those who grow up in resource-poor environments and are primed with mortality cues are more likely to value immediate rewards over delayed rewards.
author: Anna Lembke, Dopamine Nation (2021)

quote: Sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
author: Arthur C. Clarke, Profiles of the Future (1962)

quote: Your opinion of me is not the opinion that I have of myself. You ain't make me, so you can't break me. You didn't build me, so you can't kill me.
author: Deion Sanders

quote: Luck is when opportunity meets preparation.
Your failure protects their ego.
author: Alex Hormozi

quote: Belief triggers the power to do.
author: David J. Schwartz, The Magic of Thinking Big

quote: Risk being seen in all your glory.
author: Jim Carrey, Maharishi University commencement speech (2014)

quote: You have not because you ask not.
author: James 4:2, the Bible

quote: I want it to be crystal clear: if you have no money and you want to make money, you should have no shame.
author: Alex Hormozi

quote: Money don't make me, I make money.

quote: I don't ever give up.
author: Elon Musk

quote: My philosophy is: you play to win. You don't play it by half measures.
author: Elon Musk, interview with Tucker Carlson

quote: If you walked around your house with a musket you'd make better decisions.

quote: You don't want to be the oldest person at the frat party. That's not pretty.
author: Jordan Peterson

quote: Now I move with aggression, use my mind as a weapon. 'Cause chances are never given, they're taken like interceptions.
author: Wale ft. Rick Ross & Meek Mill, Ambition

quote: If you're an entrepreneur and someone tells you you can't do it, you get a chip on your shoulder — you're like, I will show y'all, I'll do it.
author: Todd Graves, billionaire and founder of Raising Cane's

quote: Your boos mean nothing. I've seen what makes you cheer.
author: Rick and Morty

quote: Those who do not move do not notice their chains.
The fastest way to kill a big dream is to introduce it to a small mind.
Hate me or love me, you watched. That's all you could do.
author: Pete Weber, professional bowler, at his PBA Tour retirement (2021)

quote: I'm an inventor. If you want to boil down what I am, I'm really an inventor.
author: Jeff Bezos, podcast with Lex Fridman

quote: There's really nothing more fun than sitting at a whiteboard with a group of smart people, spitballing and coming up with new ideas.
author: Jeff Bezos, podcast with Lex Fridman

quote: The things successful people don't like to do are the same things unsuccessful people don't like to do.
Was a boy who was a dreamer and he flew so high and proud in a world full of people out to cut his young ass down.
author: Zach Bryan, Heading South

quote: Depression can't hit a moving target.
The ability to know how to get information is more important than using the mind as a garage for facts.
author: David J. Schwartz, The Magic of Thinking Big

quote: Keep grinding, boy, your life can change in one year.
author: J. Cole, Premeditated Murder

quote: Everything is out there for the taking.
author: Dana White

quote: Money is good.
Poor people stay poor because they're afraid of other poor people judging them for doing the things it takes to get rich.
Make the mistakes of ambition, not the mistakes of sloth.
author: Niccolò Machiavelli, paraphrase of The Prince, Chapter 3

quote: You can do what you put your mind to, and if you continue to put your mind to it, the game opens up new levels. And each new level that gets opened up, you're able to adapt a different mindset and a different approach.

quote: I still had the vision when I was broke.
author: A$AP Rocky, A$AP Forever

quote: If I could do it, then why can't you?
author: Tkandz ft. CXSPER, Now or Never

quote: You should be far more concerned with your current trajectory than your current results.
author: James Clear, Atomic Habits (2018)

quote: Mind over matter is magic. I do magic.
author: Frank Ocean, White Ferrari, Blonde (2016)

quote: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
author: James Clear, Atomic Habits (2018)

quote: The man who lies to himself can be more easily offended than anyone. You know it is sometimes very pleasant to take offense, isn't it?
author: Fyodor Dostoevsky, The Brothers Karamazov, Book II, Chapter II

quote: The man who lies to himself and listens to his own lie comes to a point that he cannot distinguish the truth within him.
author: Fyodor Dostoevsky, The Brothers Karamazov, Book II, Chapter II

quote: When we started Apple, we said we have absolutely nothing to lose. And we figured even if we crash and burn and lose everything, the experience will have been worth ten times the cost.
author: Steve Jobs, interview at NeXT Computer (November 14, 1994)

quote: If you're afraid of failing, you won't get very far.
author: Steve Jobs, interview at NeXT Computer (November 14, 1994)

quote: Therefore, develop a passion for learning. This is the only way you never cease to grow.
author: Gautam Adani, Indian billionaire

quote: You wanna work so hard that you don't have time for depression.
author: Donald Trump

quote: Look fear straight in the eye, and it will disappear.
author: Elon Musk, Fox News interview with Bret Baier (March 2025)

quote: The breaking of a habit doesn't matter as long as the reclaiming of it is fast.
author: James Clear, Atomic Habits (2018)

quote: We live in an age in which there is no heroic death.
author: Yukio Mishima, Japanese author who died by ritual suicide in 1970 after a failed coup d'état

quote: Talk to God before I go to sleep, He hit me right back.
author: A$AP Rocky, HIGHJACK

quote: We are America. Second to none. And we own the finish line!
author: Joe Biden

quote: Great things start in little rooms.
author: André 3000, 2025 Rock and Roll Hall of Fame induction speech

quote: One of the things you have to understand about creative people is that they continually step outside of the domain of evaluation structures.
author: Jordan Peterson

quote: A creative person who isn't being creative — they just wither and die.
author: Jordan Peterson

quote: Ayahuasca really helped me learn a lot of things about myself.
author: Justin Kan, co-founder of Twitch

quote: Begin at the beginning.
author: Lewis Carroll, Alice's Adventures in Wonderland (1865)

quote: You do have to think until your brain hurts. If you haven't thought until your brain hurts, you haven't tried hard enough.
author: Elon Musk

quote: If you're scared to take a chance, how the fuck are we gonna get rich?
author: J. Cole, Firing Squad

quote: The path we all follow toward success, no matter how we define it, is never as easy as just 'try hard enough.'
author: Robert Herjavec, You Don't Have to Be a Shark (2016)

quote: I'm just what you made, God.
author: Kid Cudi

quote: Stop taking constructive criticism from people who have never constructed anything.
There is truth in beauty.
author: Elon Musk, podcast with Nikhil Kamath

quote: And it's hard to dance with the devil on your back, so shake him off!
author: Florence + The Machine, Shake It Out

quote: If the brain is stymied and the intellectual approach cannot arrive at a clear decision, the emotional factor will always tip the scales. Always.
author: Robert Herjavec, You Don't Have to Be a Shark (2016)

quote: It's the lonely chapter. It's the chapter where you don't fit in with your own friends, but you don't have the outcomes yet to fit in to a new group of friends.
author: Alex Hormozi, podcast with Chris Williamson

quote: Nobody else in the world has the same opportunity to create success against overwhelming odds as Americans.
author: Robert Herjavec, You Don't Have to Be a Shark (2016)

quote: Don't waste time regretting the fact that you didn't make the move earlier, and refuse to beat yourself up about it.
author: Robert Herjavec, You Don't Have to Be a Shark (2016)

quote: Ideas don't come out fully formed. They only become clear when you work on them. You just have to get started.
author: Mark Zuckerberg, Harvard commencement speech (2017)

quote: I think it's generally human nature to overestimate risk and underestimate opportunity.
author: Jeff Bezos

quote: All my years in business have convinced me that you don't lose anything by being natural and you risk everything by being perceived as a fake.
author: Robert Herjavec, You Don't Have to Be a Shark (2016)

quote: We are not creatures of instinct. We are architects of destiny.
The devil cannot make hell beautiful, so he makes beautiful roads that lead there.
The freedom of the West is the exception in human history, not the norm.
What we really want seems impossibly out of reach and ridiculous to expect, so we never dare to ask the universe for it. I'm saying I'm the proof that you can ask the universe for it.
author: Jim Carrey, Maharishi University commencement speech (2014)

quote: In every person you meet, there's a little piece of God in them. That's who you talk to.
There's a difference between knowing the path and walking the path.
author: Morpheus, The Matrix (1999)

quote: This is the best fucking time ever in the history of technology, ever, period, to start a company.
author: Sam Altman, interview with YC (2025)

quote: Basically all people — almost 98% of people in the world — will try to pull you back and say it seems a little bit too crazy, a little bit too out there, a little bit too ambitious.
author: Sam Altman, podcast with YC (2018)

quote: If you're starting a company, you always want to aim for monopoly and you always want to avoid competition.
author: Peter Thiel, CS183B lecture at Stanford (2014)

quote: God placed the best things in life on the other side of terror.
author: Will Smith

quote: Nobody knows enough to be a pessimist.
All instincts that do not discharge themselves outwardly turn inward.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, On the Genealogy of Morals

quote: I do believe that you shouldn't worry about criticism from someone that you would never ask advice from.
author: Aaron Rodgers, NFL quarterback

quote: I don't know what racism is. I know a good motherfucker named Uncle Bob though.
author: Lil Wayne, speaking about the white police officer who saved his life

quote: As we let our own light shine, we unconsciously give other people permission to do the same.
You gotta be patient with yourself when you're becoming someone you've never been before.
Nothing feels better to a coward than to watch a brave guy fall.
author: Dave Chappelle

quote: Just because you can rationalize it doesn't mean it's right. If you can feel it, then it's right.
author: Cillian Murphy, actor

quote: We know about all those things. We just choose to enjoy ourselves amidst the absurdity of it all.
You cannot find a successful person in life who doesn't have an ego. That's just a part of the whole scenario.
author: Michael Jordan

quote: Hate usually comes from below.
Emotions are not problems. They're signals.
There comes a time as a man you gotta sack up. Watched it fall apart, time to pick the pieces back up.
author: G-Eazy, Tulips & Roses

quote: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, Twilight of the Idols (1889)

quote: Become who you are.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, Thus Spoke Zarathustra (1883–1885)

quote: The higher we soar, the smaller we appear to those who cannot fly.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, Thus Spoke Zarathustra (1883–1885)

quote: Can't stop the spirits when they need you. This life is more than just a read-through.
author: Red Hot Chili Peppers, Can't Stop

quote: Stay far from timid. Only make moves when your heart's in it. And live the phrase 'sky's the limit.'
author: Notorious B.I.G., Sky's the Limit

quote: If the devil wants to dance with you, you better say never, 'cause a dance with the devil might last you forever.
author: Immortal Technique, Dance with the Devil

quote: All my people gotta stay on a positive vibe. Negativity just brings failure. We ain't trying to fail in this game. We trying to succeed.
author: Biggie Smalls

quote: Try your best. Try everything you can, and don't you worry what their bitter hearts are gonna say.
author: Jimmy Eat World, The Middle

quote: Yeah, it's overwhelming, but what else can we do? Get jobs and offices and wake up for the morning commute?
author: MGMT, Time to Pretend

quote: Didn't make sense not to live for fun. Your brain gets smart, but your head gets dumb.
author: Smash Mouth, All Star

quote: I never could see why people would reach for a fake-ass facade that they couldn't keep up.
author: Kanye West, Everything I Am

quote: Any rumor you ever heard about me was true and legendary.
author: Kanye West, No More Parties in LA

quote: A 38-year-old, 8-year-old with rich nigga problems.
author: Kanye West, No More Parties in LA

quote: Though you can see when you're wrong, you know you can't always see when you're right. You're right.
author: Billy Joel, Vienna

quote: Nah, that man in the mirror ain't normal.
author: Euro, Tuxedo ft. Lil Wayne

quote: No mistakes in life ever. It's only lessons.
author: Big Sean

quote: At the end of this semester, I received a C in every class on my college transcript. But I learned a whole lot more than when I was making A's.
author: Matthew McConaughey, Greenlights

quote: If you don't remember anything else I say here today, remember this: unemployment will not help your relationship.
author: Chris Gardner, the person the film Pursuit of Happyness was based on

quote: What do you know about doing five beats a day for three summers?
author: Kanye West

quote: You can have what you want. Be what you want.
Do you know your enemy?
author: Green Day, Know Your Enemy

quote: Violence is an energy, against the enemy, so rally up the demons of your soul.
author: Green Day, Know Your Enemy

quote: It is that simple.
What is good? All that heightens the feeling of power in man, the will to power, power itself. What is bad? All that proceeds from weakness.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, The Antichrist

quote: This is it. This is the freedom you wanted when you were stuck in school.
There is no virtue in victimhood.
Fear has killed more dreams than failure ever has.
Do the work and it will come.
The surest way to corrupt a youth is to instruct him to hold in higher esteem those who think alike than those who think differently.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quote: It's only crazy until you do it.
Don't ask if your dreams are crazy. Ask if they're crazy enough.
Do not quote laws to we who hold swords.
author: Pompey, as recorded by Plutarch in Lives (c. 100 AD)

quote: Better to live a life of 'oh wells' than 'what ifs.'
Be like water.
You're only young once. You can stay immature indefinitely.
Wouldn't you rather it be difficult?
No weapon formed against me shall prosper.
The amount of money we receive will always be in direct proportion to the demand for what we do, our ability to do it, and the difficulty in replacing us.
The person who says it cannot be done should not interrupt the person doing it.
A real loser is someone so afraid of failing they don't even try.
All we ever have is the present moment.
Where attention goes, energy flows.
Realistic goals don't get you excited.
You know, sometimes all you need is 20 seconds of insane courage. Just 20 seconds of embarrassing bravery. And I promise you, something great will come of it.
There are no spare customers. It's a competitive world.
author: Tilman Fertitta, American billionaire, owner of Landry's restaurants and the Houston Rockets

quote: Nobody knows what they're doing, but some people do it anyway.
Pessimists get to sound smart. Optimists get to make money.
Everything around you was created by people no smarter than you.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: When you compete ferociously, you will get better at what you're competing on, but you will always narrow your focus to beating the people around you.
author: Peter Thiel

quote: If you're taught you can't do anything, you won't do anything. I was taught I can do anything.
author: Kanye West

quote: It ultimately comes down to taste. It comes down to trying to expose yourself to the best things that humans have done, and then try to bring those things into what you're doing.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: Good looks don't cook the dinner, but they'll get you a seat at the table.
author: Matthew McConaughey, Greenlights

quote: The bigger the stuff you ask God for, the greater the requirements.
author: Steve Harvey

quote: Victory awaits he who has his things in order. People call it luck.
author: Roald Amundsen, first person to reach the South Pole

quote: Good health is like a crown that the healthy wear but only the sick can see.
The strong do what they can and the weak suffer what they must.
author: Athens to Melos, History of the Peloponnesian War by Thucydides (416 BC)

quote: If you keep looking back, you're gonna trip going forward.
author: Gucci Mane's father

quote: If you don't find a way to make money while you sleep, you will work until you die.
You have as much authority as you assume.
There is no passion to be found playing small — in settling for a life that is less than the one you are capable of living.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: Fear is a mile wide and an inch deep.
You are way tougher than you even realize.
Don't ask yourself what the world needs. Ask yourself what makes you come alive, and then do that. Because the world needs more people who have come alive.
The child who is not embraced by the village will burn it down to feel its warmth.
You make sure they remember, forever, the night they played the Titans.
author: Coach Yoast, Remember the Titans (2000)

quote: The amount of opportunity will always be limited by your ability to recognize it.
Fear is often nothing more than false expectations appearing real.
You earn your trophies at practice. You just pick them up at competitions.
The villain says 'the world hurt me, I'm going to hurt it back.' The hero says 'the world hurt me, I'm not going to let it hurt others.'
You don't become confident by doing affirmations in the mirror, but by having a stack of undeniable proof that you are who you say you are.
Death smiles at us all. All a man can do is smile back.
More is lost by indecision than by wrong decision.
Waiting to jump does not make the cold water any warmer.
Our deepest fear is not that we are inadequate. Our deepest fear is that we are powerful beyond measure. It is our light, not our darkness, that most frightens us.
author: Marianne Williamson, A Return to Love (1992)

quote: The price of greatness is responsibility.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: Procrastination is a declaration to God that you do not respect the time you have been given.
Enthusiasm is experienced in relationship to a goal.
When someone says something hurtful but also true, it's your job to make them unable to hurt you by making it not true anymore.
The secret to harvesting from existence the greatest fruitfulness and the greatest enjoyment is to live dangerously.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, The Gay Science

quote: Slow is smooth. Smooth is fast.
Women and children can be careless, but not men.
author: Michael Corleone, The Godfather (1972)

quote: It's better to be a warrior in a garden than a gardener in a war.
Until death, all defeat is psychological.
The fears we don't face become our limits.
The difference between bravery and stupidity is oftentimes the outcome.
Postponement promises safety and perfection but leads to stagnation and regret.
If she's rude to the waiter, then if you were the waiter, she'd be rude to you too.
We choose to go to the Moon not because it is easy, but because it is hard — because that challenge is one we are willing to accept, one we are unwilling to postpone, and one which we intend to win.
author: John F. Kennedy, Rice University (September 12, 1962)

quote: One of my favorite business models: look at what everyone's doing, do it in half the time.
author: Alex Hormozi

quote: Take what you do seriously without taking yourself seriously.

The sun don't stop for nobody. The sun's gonna be up in the morning regardless. So are you gonna let the days go by, or are you gonna pick it up, figure it out, and let life go on? I'm a life goes on type of guy.
author: Kevin Hart

quote: One hour of doing is better than ten hours of thinking.
Normal training gets you normal results.
author: David Goggins

quote: Pain is there to ask you one simple question: do you really want to achieve your goals, or are you just a talker?
Struggle is a biological requirement for greatness.
Rain is a requirement for flowers to grow, and pain is a requirement for power to grow.
Addiction is pain without purpose. Withdrawal is pain with purpose.
It's much easier to avoid temptation than it is to resist it.
He who does not read has no advantage over he who cannot read.
Nature has made up her mind that what cannot defend itself shall not be defended.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: A society grows great when old men plant trees whose shade they know they shall never sit in.
Many people want you to do things up to the point where they lose control of you.
author: Kevin Hart, I Can't Make This Up (2017)

quote: Most men die at 25 but aren't buried until they're 75.
Today is victory over yourself of yesterday. Tomorrow is your victory over lesser men.
author: Miyamoto Musashi, A Book of Five Rings (1645)

quote: The noble soul has reverence for itself.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, Beyond Good and Evil

quote: He who fights with monsters should be careful lest he thereby become a monster. And if you gaze long enough into an abyss, the abyss will gaze back into you.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, Beyond Good and Evil

quote: The individual has always had to struggle to keep from being overwhelmed by the tribe. If you try it, you will be lonely often, and sometimes frightened. But no price is too high to pay for the privilege of owning yourself.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, Beyond Good and Evil

quote: You have your way. I have my way. As for the right way, the correct way, and the only way — it does not exist.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, Thus Spoke Zarathustra

quote: Pity makes suffering contagious.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche, Thus Spoke Zarathustra

quote: The United States is a distillation of the human spirit of exploration.
author: Elon Musk

quote: Your worst sin is that you have destroyed and betrayed yourself for nothing.
author: Fyodor Dostoevsky

quote: Your lack of effort is almost an insult to those who believe in you.
author: Conor McGregor

quote: We all want to help one another. Human beings are like that. We want to live by each other's happiness, not by each other's misery.
author: Charlie Chaplin, The Great Dictator (1940)

quote: Of the six people who started PayPal, four had built bombs in high school.
author: Peter Thiel, Zero to One (2014)

quote: Insecurity breeds greatness.
If you wouldn't take advice from them, why would you take criticism from them?
No matter your age, you'll always wish you started younger. Yet today is the youngest you'll ever be.
It's better to know you're bad for a season than to think you're good for a lifetime.
You have to let other people's dream of you die so that your dream can live.
Stress comes from ignoring something you shouldn't be ignoring.
author: Jeff Bezos

quote: An ounce of prevention is worth a pound of cure.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Any jackass can kick down a barn, but it takes a carpenter to build one back up.
The hand of the diligent will rule, but the lazy man will be put to forced labor.
author: Proverbs 12:24, the Bible

quote: The truth is not for all men, but only for those who seek it.
author: Ayn Rand

quote: Death is not the greatest loss in life. The greatest loss is what dies inside us while we live.
If you are frustrated with yourself, it means you have not given up on yourself yet.
Double your rate of failure.
That's the most powerful thing in the world — when you can find drive in your own doubt, fear, and insecurities, you become unstoppable.
author: David Goggins

quote: We're all looking for passion. Passion is all around you. It's your insecurities, all that stuff. You gotta dive deep into that. All the energy and fuel you need is right inside yourself.
author: David Goggins

quote: You're not making as much money as you want because you're not as good as you think you are yet.
Risk more than others think is safe. Care more than others think is wise. Dream more than others think is practical. Expect more than others think is possible.
author: Claude Bissell, president of the University of Toronto

quote: Everything feels difficult when you're about to level up.
All the water in the world cannot sink a ship unless it gets inside.
When the whole world is running toward a cliff, he who is running in the opposite direction appears to have lost his mind.
author: C.S. Lewis

quote: Consciousness is expensive. Your brain may try to lull you into less conscious patterns and routines.
The road to hell is paved with good intentions.
When you focus on problems, you'll have more problems. When you focus on opportunities, you'll have more opportunities.
I had to look at my insecurities and my fear and find drive in that.
author: David Goggins

quote: One gym session missed won't harm you. But the mentality that lets you skip one session guilt-free will.
Circumstance does not change responsibility.
There is no such thing as a big break. No one outside of you is going to forge your path or make things happen for you.
author: Jason Derulo

quote: Children have an energy that most adults have grown out of.
Your desire to compromise can be a weapon used against you by your opponent.
Be yourself. The world worships the original.
author: Ingrid Bergman

quote: Today is the youngest you will ever be again.
For those who fight for it, life has a flavor the protected will never know.
author: Engraving on a Vietnam veteran's Zippo lighter

quote: The advantage of being the little guy is that nobody will see you coming.
You can literally just do stuff.
Addiction is addiction, no matter the drug.
Many problems of the mind cannot be solved at the level of the mind.
Creativity is related to playfulness.
Respect the game and the game will respect you.
author: Michael Jordan

quote: Nobody is more inferior than those who insist on being equal.
